bead.title: runs: docs (FEAT-008/010/019/021) + telemetry audit events
bead.description: Update FEAT-008 (web UI), FEAT-010 (run architecture), FEAT-019 (agent eval), FEAT-021 (multi-node dashboard) to reflect new tab structure. Document audit-event schema for re-queue.
bead.acceptance: 1. All four FEATs updated. 2. Audit-event schema documented. 3. ddx doc audit clean.
